title: ASR Outdoor Safety Disposable Vest High Visibility One Size Fits Most Lime Green
description:
Make sure you're visible at all times with the Universal Fit Disposable Safety Vest! This vest is ideal for emergency kits, auto emergencies, hiking, camping or biking. The bright lime green color will ensure that you are visible to cars and other passersby. Each vest is constructed of durable weather resistance PVC and is .10mm thick. It measures 29" x 19", making sure it fits just about anybody. Grab one of these before your next camping or biking trip!
